3401.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
3401.description: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

3402.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
3402.description: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

3403.title: Top 50 90s Rocks!
3403.description: Put on your denim/leather/parka jacket and grab your grunge/thrash/indie air guitar! We are rocking out to 50 of the most awesome anthems from the 1990s!

3404.title: Never Forget The 90s!
3404.description: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.

3405.title: 90s Mixtape!
3405.description: No-nonsense, hand-picked selection of 90's pop, R'n'B and dance videos from the MTV vaults.

3406.title: 90s Biggest Ballads!
3406.description: Get ready to sing your heart out to this selection of 90s power ballads! You don't want to miss a thing!

3407.title: Alternative 90s Anthems!
3407.description: The 90s gave us some incredible alternative anthems and we're playing a bunch of them for you right now!

3408.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
3408.description: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.
